hooks.name: vidux-pre-commit
hooks.description: Validates that code changes have a corresponding PLAN.md task entry. Prevents unplanned code from being committed.

hooks.name: vidux-checkpoint
hooks.description: Updates PLAN.md Progress section with a checkpoint entry after each commit.

hooks.name: vidux-three-strike
hooks.description: Tracks consecutive failures on the same surface. After 3 failures, escalates to move up one abstraction layer.
